title.en: Under the Great Time Array, Ye Tian began to re...

content.en:
Ye Tian took out a cultivation tower, placed it in this small realm, and then opened the time array of the cultivation tower.

Although this time array is not as long as the 10,000 times time of the Time Tower, it can also be accelerated to thousands of times, but it consumes more resources, which is also because this time array is not of high grade and is relatively average.

However, Ye Tian is not short of these resources now, so he naturally doesn't care.

In fact, he himself could also speed up his cultivation by 10,000 times, but if he accelerated his time by 10,000 times all the time, he would not be able to cultivate, and naturally he would not be able to do so in order to save time.

Under the Great Time Array, Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate.

In this retreat, he was ready to practice alchemy.

He had a large amount of Heavenly Soul Fruit in his hand, so he naturally found a way to refine it into a Heavenly Soul Pill, and he was not at ease when he handed over the task of refining the Heavenly Soul Pill to others, and he had to refine it himself.

But his alchemy attainments are not high, and if he comes to refine it himself, the probability of failure is very high.

Therefore, he is ready to continue to practice alchemy, he himself also has alchemy talent, and has copied other people's super god-level alchemy talent, in terms of talent, it is definitely the highest grade of chaos, so as long as he keeps practicing, his alchemy attainment can definitely reach a very high level.

In the following days, Ye Tian took out a large number of elixirs to refine pills, from the beginning, he could only refine pills suitable for the level of Earth Venerable, and slowly he could refine pills suitable for the level of God General and Heavenly Monarch.

During this period, Ye Tian didn't know how many elixirs had been wasted, although he had also refined a lot of pills, but the whole was in a state of blood loss, but Ye Tian didn't care about these losses at all.

Ten years in the outside world, under the great array of time, Ye Tian has been cultivating alchemy for tens of thousands of years, and at this moment, Ye Tian's alchemy attainments are already very high, enough to refine the pill suitable for the true ancestor, but the success rate is not too high.

And the grade of the Heavenly Soul Pill is not very high, but its effect is very good, so it has created a great reputation for the Heavenly Soul Pill.

Therefore, Ye Tian's current alchemy attainment, if he refined, the success rate of refining the Heavenly Soul Pill was very high.

"Start refining the Heavenly Soul Pill!"

Ye Tian took out the Heavenly Soul Fruit and took out some auxiliary elixirs, he didn't know how many elixirs he had collected before, there were all kinds of them, so there was no shortage of auxiliary elixirs.

After that, Ye Tian began to officially refine.

Since it was the first time to refine the Heavenly Soul Pill, even if Ye Tian's alchemy attainment was high, it was still eight or nine times out of ten refining failures at the beginning, and after refining it dozens of times, it was only after refining it dozens of times that the success rate was more than ninety percent.

With the passage of time, one by one the Heavenly Soul Pills were born.

Under normal circumstances, one Heavenly Soul Fruit can only refine one Heavenly Soul Pill, but if the alchemy attainment is high, one Heavenly Soul Fruit has a small chance of giving birth to two Heavenly Soul Pills, and the effect is not bad.

As Ye Tian refined more and more Heavenly Soul Pills, almost all of them were one furnace and two Heavenly Soul Pills.

In this way, in the thousands of years in the Time Array, Ye Tian almost exhausted all the Heavenly Soul Fruits, and finally harvested at least 150,000 Heavenly Soul Pills.

"150,000 Heavenly Soul Pills, if this is passed out, I'm afraid I don't know how many Dao Ancestors want my life, even if it is my master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, I'm afraid he will put down his son and ask me for it, right?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Of course, he won't say it, and the good things are naturally kept for himself.

Immediately, he took a Heavenly Soul Pill.

This time, he took the Heavenly Soul Pill not to cultivate any origin supernatural power, nor to cultivate any secret technique, but to create a chaotic body refining technique.

Now, he has obtained a large number of inheritances, and has harvested an unknown number of Chaos Alchemy Inheritances, so he has enough background to create his own Chaos Alchemy.

But if you want to create an extremely high-level Chaos Alchemy Technique, it takes a lot of time, and in this era, there are countless opportunities, and every once in a while, there will be great opportunities, and everyone's cultivation speed is extremely fast.

It was impossible for him to waste his time on creating the Chaos Alchemy Technique, otherwise he would become a Dao Ancestor, and he might still be wandering at the True Monarch level.

And the Heavenly Soul Pill gave him hope, which would allow him to create an amazing Chaos Alchemy at an extreme time.

"Let's get started!"

Under the effect of the Heavenly Soul Pill, Ye Tian spent 10,000 years in a short period of time, and in an instant, Ye Tian almost created most of the Chaos Alchemy Technique.

"It's so difficult, not a single Heavenly Soul Pill has allowed me to create a Chaos Body Refining Technique, it seems that I still need to take a second one!"

Ye Tian took another Heavenly Soul Pill.

This time, he had finally created a Chaos Alchemy Technique, far surpassing other Chaos Alchemy Techniques, which was enough to raise his physical body to its current extreme.

Ye Tian gave this Chaos Body Alchemy Technique a name, called the Nine Extremes True Body Technique!

The Nine Extremes True Body Technique is divided into nine poles, and for other True Monarchs, cultivating the first pole is enough to advance the physical body to the limit of the physical body, and they are not qualified to cultivate the second pole at all.

And Ye Tian had to cultivate the Nine Extremes True Body to the Nine Extremes realm before he could advance his physical body to the limit.

Next, Ye Tian spent a lot of resources to advance his physical realm.

Since there was no shortage of resources, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was very fast and unbelievable.

In one year this year, the first pole of the Nine Extremes True Body Formula has been practiced.

Ye Tian's physical body was already very powerful, so cultivating to the first pole only made Ye Tian's foundation more stable, and his strength did not improve much.

After that, Ye Tian practiced the second pole, the third pole, and until he practiced the sixth pole, at this time Ye Tiancai really reached the realm of being level with the physical body.

If he cultivated to the seventh pole, Ye Tian's physical body would be able to usher in a transformation, and his strength would skyrocket.

At this time, Ye Tian also seemed to understand why the domain realm did not have a Chaos Alchemy Technique like the Nine Extremes True Body Technique, because there was no need to create such a Chaos Alchemy Technique.

The first six poles of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique are only one level stronger than the Golden Ape Body Alchemy Technique, and those middle and triple heaven forces or the Upper Triple Heaven Forces definitely have Chaos Alchemy techniques comparable to the first six poles of the Nine Extremes True Body Formula, such as Black Wind Mountain.

However, other True Monarchs couldn't practice the Sixth Pole at all, even if it was a real Demon Heavenly Pride, it was enough to be comparable to the Sixth Pole of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique, and no matter how much it was, there would be no way to cultivate.

For other True Monarchs, the Seventh Pole, Eighth Pole, and Ninth Pole of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique were no different from the True Ancestor level alchemy techniques.

"The eighth and ninth poles of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique are relatively difficult to cultivate, and it will take a long time, but it shouldn't take long to practice to reach the seventh pole, and once I practice the seventh pole, my strength will skyrocket, even if I leave the small realm, I don't have to be afraid of the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he planned to leave the small realm after cultivating the seventh pole of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed in the outside world.

In the past hundred years, a famous Dao Ancestor has incarnated into the battlefield ruins, and countless opportunities have been excavated.

Every day, there is news that the True Monarch has obtained a great opportunity, from time to time there is a True Monarch who has become a half-step True Ancestor, and from time to time there is also news that the Dao Ancestor has incarnated and fallen.

And I don't know how many True Monarchs died, and there are even many relics of Dao Ancestors who have fallen on the battlefield.

this day.

Somewhere in the ruins of the battlefield, spatial ripples rippled, and a figure walked out.

This person is Ye Tian!
